# Stocky Fun — AI-Powered Crypto Trading Dashboard
# https://fun.stockyai.xyz

> Casino-style BTC trading PWA with AI signals, live charts, paper trading, and community chat.

## About

Stocky Fun is a free, open-source Progressive Web App for real-time BTC/USD technical analysis. It uses Groq LLM (Llama 3.3 70B) to generate AI-powered buy/sell/hold signals from natural language prompts, combined with comprehensive technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, EMA, ATR).

## Features

- Real-time BTC/USD charts via TradingView and GeckoTerminal
- AI trading signals from natural language prompts
- Technical analysis: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, EMA (9/21/200), ATR
- Paper trading simulator with PnL tracking
- Community chat
- Mobile-first swipeable UI (PWA installable on iOS/Android)
- Multi-coin: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB

## AI API

POST https://fun.stockyai.xyz/api/analyze
Body: { "prompt": "Should I buy BTC now?", "coin": "bitcoin" }
Returns: prediction, confidence, signal, rationale, key levels, action, risk

## More Info

- Full LLM integration guide: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/llm.md
- Project summary: https://fun.stockyai.xyz/summary.md
- Source code: https://github.com/SirCharan/stocky-fun

## Tech Stack

React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Framer Motion, Node.js, Express, Groq LLM, CoinGecko API, TradingView, Vercel serverless.

https://x.com/yourasianquant
